2.arabic: طَابَتْ تَرَاهَا بِرَسُولِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ سَلَامُنَا

10.latin: Ya Rasulullah haitsuma kunna wa awladana

11.latin: Ya Rasulullah istajib du'aana wa nida'ana

12.arabic: يَارَسُولَ اللّٰهِ مِنْ خَيْرِ جُودِكَ جُدْلَنَا
12.latin: Ya Rasulullah min khoiri judika judlana

13.latin: Ya Rasulullah wa liqouka huwa munana

14.arabic: يَارَسُولَ اللّٰهِ مِنْ بَرَكَاتِكَ هَبْ لَنَا
14.latin: Ya Rasulullah min barokatika hab lana

15.latin: Ya Rasulullah fi dunyana wa ukhrana

19.arabic: يَارَسُولَ اللّٰهِ عَلَى اللّٰهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا

text.1: itu kubah bagus kota nabi kita
text.2: bagus tanahnya karena keberadaan sang utusan bernama Muhammad semoga salam kita tercurah kepadanya
text.3: wahai utusan Allah sampaikanlah kami pada sesuatu yang jauh
text.4: wahai utusan Allah hanya engkaulah tujuan kami
text.5: wahai utusan Allah kami berdiam diri didepan pintumu
text.6: wahai utusan Allah bukalah pintumu untuk kami
text.7: Wahai utusan Allah kami sungguh mencintaimu maka terimalah kami
text.8: wahai Utusan Allah mengingatmu adalah obat bagi kami
text.9: wahai utusan Allah namamu adalah cahaya kami
text.10: wahai Utusan Allah dimanapun kami dan anak anak kami berada
text.11: wahai utusan Allah ijabahi Doa dan panggilan kami
text.12: wahai utusan Allah bermurah hatilah kepada kami
text.13: wahai Utusan Allah berjumpa denganmu ialah tujuan kami
text.15: wahai utusan Allah di dunia dan akhirat kami
text.16: wahai Utusan Allah engkaulah pemberi syafaat kami
text.17: wahai Utusan Allah tunjukanlah kami seperti yang telah engkau tunjukan
text.18: wahai Utusan Allah jadikanlah kami sebagian orang orang yang kau cintai
text.19: wahai utusan Allah hanya kepada Allah semuanya kupasrahkan
text.20: wahai utusan Allah semoga kami semua diampuni segala dosa dan diridloi
text.22: wahai utusan Allah dihadapanmu terimalah permohonan kami

text.1: That is the beautiful dome of the city of our Prophet
text.2: Its land is good because of the presence of the messenger named Muhammad, may our blessings be poured upon him
text.3: O Messenger of Allah, from afar we have arrived
text.4: O Messenger of Allah, to none other than you is our destination
text.5: O Messenger of Allah, at your door we stand
text.6: O Messenger of Allah, open your door for us
text.7: O Messenger of Allah, I truly love you so accept us
text.8: O Messenger of Allah, remembering you is a cure for us
text.9: O Messenger of Allah, your name is our light
text.10: O Messenger of Allah, wherever we and our children are
text.11: O Messenger of Allah, answer our prayers and calls
text.12: O Messenger of Allah, from the best of your generosity, be generous to us
text.13: O Messenger of Allah, meeting you is our hope
text.14: O Messenger of Allah, from your blessings, bestow upon us
text.15: O Messenger of Allah, in our world and our hereafter
text.16: O Messenger of Allah, you are our intercessor
text.17: O Messenger of Allah, by your guidance we are guided
text.18: O Messenger of Allah, make us among those you love
text.19: O Messenger of Allah, upon Allah our Lord we rely
text.20: O Messenger of Allah, we ask Him for forgiveness and His pleasure
text.21: O Messenger of Allah, we stretch our hands for help
text.22: O Messenger of Allah, by your status may He accept our prayer
